requirement_topic.en: Pressure Equipment Directive — Refrigerant Circuit Classification (PED / EN 378)
requirement_topic.zh: 压力设备指令——制冷剂回路分类（PED / EN 378）
requirement_topic.zht: 壓力設備指令——制冷劑迴路分類（PED / EN 378）

summary.en: Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU (PED) applies in Denmark as an EU member state. Refrigerant circuits are classified by fluid group (Group 1 = flammable or toxic refrigerants such as R290; Group 2 = non-flammable, non-toxic refrigerants such as R32 and R410A), maximum allowable pressure, and volume. Category I (lowest risk) allows manufacturer self-declaration; Categories II, III, and IV require involvement of a Notified Body. DS EN 378-1 to EN 378-4 are the Danish Standards adoptions of the EN 378 refrigerating system safety series, applied alongside PED.
summary.zh: 作为欧盟成员国，压力设备指令2014/68/EU（PED）在丹麦适用。制冷剂回路按流体组别（第1组=可燃或有毒制冷剂，如R290；第2组=不可燃、无毒制冷剂，如R32和R410A）、最高许用压力及容积进行分类。第I类（最低风险）允许制造商自我声明；第II类、第III类和第IV类须引入公告机构。DS EN 378-1至EN 378-4是丹麦标准协会对EN 378制冷系统安全系列标准的采标，与PED配合适用。
summary.zht: 作為歐盟成員國，壓力設備指令2014/68/EU（PED）在丹麥適用。制冷劑迴路按流體組別（第1組=可燃或有毒制冷劑，如R290；第2組=不可燃、無毒制冷劑，如R32和R410A）、最高許用壓力及容積進行分類。第I類（最低風險）允許製造商自我聲明；第II類、第III類和第IV類須引入公告機構。DS EN 378-1至EN 378-4是丹麥標準協會對EN 378制冷系統安全系列標準的採標，與PED配合適用。

summary.en: TSG 21-2016 (Special Equipment Safety Technical Supervision Regulations for Boilers and Pressure Vessels, administered by SAMR) and GB 150.1-150.4-2011 (Pressure vessels) govern pressure vessels in China. SELO (Special Equipment Licensing Office) registration is required for certain pressure vessels. The Chinese risk classification methodology differs from PED: different boundary conditions, different inspection body roles, and SELO registration is not equivalent to PED CE marking or a Notified Body certificate.
summary.zh: TSG 21-2016（由市监总局管理的锅炉和压力容器安全技术监察规程）和GB 150.1-150.4-2011（压力容器）管辖中国境内的压力容器。特定压力容器须向特检院（SELO）进行注册。中国风险分类方法与PED不同：边界条件不同、检验机构职能不同，SELO注册与PED CE标志或公告机构证书不等效。
summary.zht: TSG 21-2016（由市監總局管理的鍋爐和壓力容器安全技術監察規程）和GB 150.1-150.4-2011（壓力容器）管轄中國境內的壓力容器。特定壓力容器須向特檢院（SELO）進行登記。中國風險分類方法與PED不同：邊界條件不同、檢驗機構職能不同，SELO登記與PED CE標誌或公告機構證書不等效。

gap.en: PED classification and Notified Body requirements differ substantially from the Chinese SELO/TSG system. Chinese pressure vessel approvals (TSG/SELO certificates) are not recognised under PED in Denmark. For heat pump circuits classified as PED Category II or higher, a Notified Body listed on the EU NANDO database must be engaged. Re-design or re-certification to PED categories may be required.
gap.zh: PED分类和公告机构要求与中国SELO/TSG体系存在实质性差异。在中国取得的压力容器批准（TSG/SELO证书）在丹麦PED框架下不被认可。对于被分类为PED第II类或更高类别的热泵回路，须引入欧盟NANDO数据库所列的公告机构。制冷剂回路可能需要重新设计或按PED类别重新取证。
gap.zht: PED分類和公告機構要求與中國SELO/TSG體系存在實質性差異。在中國取得的壓力容器批准（TSG/SELO證書）在丹麥PED框架下不被認可。對於被分類為PED第II類或更高類別的熱泵迴路，須引入歐盟NANDO數據庫所列的公告機構。制冷劑迴路可能需要重新設計或按PED類別重新取證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (PED applies to refrigerant circuits meeting pressure/volume thresholds in Denmark)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (TSG 21/SELO registration for applicable pressure vessels)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — PED classification and Notified Body requirements differ substantially from Chinese SELO/TSG system; existing Chinese pressure vessel approvals not recognised under PED in Denmark.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——PED分类和公告机构要求与中国SELO/TSG体系存在实质性差异；现有中国压力容器批准在丹麦PED框架下不被认可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——PED分類和公告機構要求與中國SELO/TSG體系存在實質性差異；現有中國壓力容器批准在丹麥PED框架下不被認可。

requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant Circuit Safety — EN 378 System Safety and Leak Detection
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂回路安全——EN 378系统安全与泄漏检测
requirement_topic.zht: 制冷劑迴路安全——EN 378系統安全與洩漏檢測

summary.en: PED 2014/68/EU is the mandatory legal framework for refrigerant circuits meeting its pressure, volume, and fluid-group thresholds in Denmark. EN 378-1:2016+A1:2020, EN 378-2:2016+A1:2019, EN 378-3:2016, and EN 378-4:2016 are voluntary harmonised standards for refrigerating systems and heat pumps, adopted by Danish Standards as DS EN 378. These voluntary standards cover pressure relief, leak detection, and refrigerant charge limits; applying them can support a presumption of PED conformity.
summary.zh: 在丹麦，PED 2014/68/EU是适用于达到其压力、容积和流体组别阈值的制冷剂回路的强制性法律框架。EN 378-1:2016+A1:2020、EN 378-2:2016+A1:2019、EN 378-3:2016和EN 378-4:2016是制冷系统和热泵的自愿协调标准，由丹麦标准协会采纳为DS EN 378。这些自愿标准涵盖压力释放、泄漏检测和制冷剂充注量限制；采用这些标准可支持PED符合性推定。
summary.zht: 在丹麥，PED 2014/68/EU是適用於達到其壓力、容積和流體組別閾值的制冷劑迴路的強制性法律框架。EN 378-1:2016+A1:2020、EN 378-2:2016+A1:2019、EN 378-3:2016和EN 378-4:2016是制冷系統和熱泵的自願協調標準，由丹麥標準協會採納為DS EN 378。這些自願標準涵蓋壓力釋放、洩漏檢測和制冷劑充注量限制；採用這些標準可支持PED符合性推定。

summary.en: GB 9237-2008 (Safety requirements for refrigerating systems, national adoption of ISO 5149:1993) and GB/T 18430 (household and similar air conditioner standards) are the Chinese equivalents. Charge limits for flammable refrigerants in indoor environments, room ventilation thresholds, and system documentation requirements differ from EN 378. GB 9237 does not cover the same scope of leak detection and pressure-relief valve obligations as EN 378.
summary.zh: GB 9237-2008（制冷系统安全要求，ISO 5149:1993国家采标）和GB/T 18430（家用及类似空调标准）是对应的中国标准。室内可燃制冷剂充注量限制、房间通风阈值和系统文件要求与EN 378不同。GB 9237未涵盖与EN 378同等范围的泄漏检测和安全阀义务。
summary.zht: GB 9237-2008（制冷系統安全要求，ISO 5149:1993國家採標）和GB/T 18430（家用及類似空調標準）是對應的中國標準。室內可燃制冷劑充注量限制、房間通風閾值和系統文件要求與EN 378不同。GB 9237未涵蓋與EN 378同等範圍的洩漏檢測和安全閥義務。

gap.en: PED applicability must be classified first. The voluntary EN 378 / DS EN 378 route for pressure relief, leak detection, charge limits, and documentation differs from GB 9237 practice; full system re-assessment may be needed. An alternative technically justified solution satisfying the mandatory PED requirements is also permissible.
gap.zh: 须先判定PED适用性。泄压、泄漏检测、充注量限制和文件方面的自愿EN 378 / DS EN 378路径与GB 9237做法不同；可能需要进行完整系统重新评估。也可采用其他有技术依据的方案，只要能满足PED的强制性要求。
gap.zht: 須先判定PED適用性。洩壓、洩漏檢測、充注量限制和文件方面的自願EN 378 / DS EN 378路徑與GB 9237做法不同；可能需要進行完整系統重新評估。也可採用其他有技術依據的方案，只要能滿足PED的強制性要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: PED applies where pressure/volume/fluid-group thresholds are met; EN 378 / DS EN 378 is voluntary and may confer presumption of conformity

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — PED applicability must be classified first; EN 378 / DS EN 378 is a voluntary harmonised route to presumption of conformity, not a mandatory standard, and differs from GB 9237 in leak detection, charge limits, and documentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——须先判定PED适用性；EN 378 / DS EN 378是取得符合性推定的自愿协调标准路径，并非强制标准，且其泄漏检测、充注量限制和文件方法与GB 9237不同。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——須先判定PED適用性；EN 378 / DS EN 378是取得符合性推定的自願協調標準路徑，並非強制標準，且其洩漏檢測、充注量限制和文件方法與GB 9237不同。
